title: Code with Claude Tokyo 2026: Opening Keynote
summary: Claude hosts "Code with Claude Tokyo 2026", an opening keynote event. The event appears to focus on practical code development and implementation using Claude.
writeup: This video is the opening keynote from "Code with Claude Tokyo 2026", an event hosted by Claude and centered on practical code development with the model. The keynote frames how Claude fits into real coding and implementation workflows rather than abstract demonstrations. The core concepts covered are Claude itself and code generation.
